SessionStart.command: if [[ "$PWD" == *".claude/worktrees/"* ]]; then REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if [ -n "$REPO_ROOT" ] && [ -f "$REPO_ROOT/.env.local" ] && [ ! -e ".env.local" ]; then ln -sf "$REPO_ROOT/.env.local" .env.local && echo '[hook] symlinked .env.local from repo root'; fi; fi
